name: BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters
notes:
Modify this building block to EXCLUDE :

        - log source types which do NOT include Username information OR which do NOT apply to your risk analysis goals.
            Note - This includes the "IBM Sense" event source type, as reprocessing its own output could lead to unpredictable results.

        - log source groups which do NOT apply to your risk analysis goals.
            Note - IBM has populated this rule with a test to allow event sources placed in "UBA : Trusted Log Source Group" to bypass UBA analysis. This log source group is empty by default.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Sense, Health Metrics, SIM Audit, System Notification, Anomaly Detection Engine, CRE System, Event CRE Injected, Flow Classification Engine, Asset Profiler, Search Results, Custom Rule Engine
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Trusted Log Source Group
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Common Log Source Filters on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Sense, Health Metrics, SIM Audit, System Notification, Anomaly Detection Engine, CRE System, Event CRE Injected, Flow Classification Engine, Asset Profiler, Search Results, Custom Rule Engine
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Trusted Log Source Group
